CustomField.description: Field to be used on budget to define match percentage (aka 80% match leaving 20% for the Subrecipient to allocate from other funds). Will be inherited down to child categories and details for calculations
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How much will OCJP match to the Subrecipient request? (aka 80% match leaving 20% for the Subrecipient to allocate from other funds)
CustomField.label: Match Percentage
